ambiguous_user_schemas.cause: Smoke metric counted only full SQL result payloads or list-shaped checkpoint facts. The Gemini trajectory stored the SQL result as a compact/truncated preview while the final-answer composer checkpoint still recorded successful local slot evidence.
ambiguous_user_schemas.fix: Count compacted successful local SQL evidence from checkpoint_result_bundle plus checkpoint_llm_final_answer_composer slot_counts for smoke metrics only.

mixed_inactive_journeys.cause: The LLM-owned Semantic IR planner selected CONCEPT plus LIVE_QUERY for a mixed concept-and-record prompt that had no live/current/platform/API cue.
mixed_inactive_journeys.fix: Strengthen the Semantic IR prompt with a general show/list actual-records local-source rule, an inactive-journey local snapshot rule, and an explicit CONCEPT plus LOCAL_QUERY example.

before.final_answer: I found runtime evidence but could not compose a verified final answer...

compare_local_live_birthday_status.cause: When the LLM final answer and one repair failed the semantic gate, the safe fallback preserved evidence safety but used generic could-not-compose wording and the executor still recorded the failed pre-fallback gate as the final gate.
compare_local_live_birthday_status.fix: Make fallback text a scoped evidence-state answer when local facts exist, add live/API unavailable caveat when API evidence failed, and semantically recheck the fallback before recording final answer diagnostics.

smoke_before.source: user-provided current objective state and pre-fix gemini_openai_compat_smoke report

smoke_after_attempt.skip_reason: Gemini OpenAI-Compatible V2 Toolcall Smoke probe did not return native SDK tool/function calls.

gemini_toolcall_blocker.note: The locally visible GEMINI_API_KEY still returns HTML 400 for the OpenAI-compatible probe, so the post-fix Gemini smoke rows could not be rerun in this Codex process.

ready_for_gemini_dev_eval_reason: Do not run dev eval until Gemini smoke is 7/7. The live Gemini smoke could not execute rows because the probe returned HTML 400 in this environment.
